title: dysoxylum griffithii
intro: Dysoxylum griffithii is a plant species native to India, also known as the Indian rosewood or kala sagar, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dysoxylum griffithii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. In Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is used in various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
